ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the track */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the track on the streaming service */,
  "chart_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the track entered the chart */,
  "chart_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the track left the chart */,
  "chart_country" TEXT /* Country of the chart */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the artist's latest album */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Artist's popularity score */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Artist's biography */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., album, single) */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the album is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature record */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the track was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated track */,
  "chart_position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the chart */,
  "chart_country" TEXT /* Country of the chart */,
  "chart_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the track entered the chart */,
  "chart_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the track left the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track version */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated track */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the playlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "playlist_id")
)
